narrative:
Cols 71-F (precinct in Franklin County) has 412 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 7.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 25.2%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 17.5 percentage points.
